Discover your spend type

Take a short quiz to identify your SpendType. Then continue to a personalized service where the same result shapes reminders, spending reflection, and savings goals.

12 questions8 SpendTypes3 app scenarios

How the demo works

1. Answer the quiz
Your responses are scored across rationality, planning, risk appetite, and security sensitivity.

2. Get your SpendType
The result explains your decision style, strengths, blindspots, and suggested nudges.

3. Continue to banking scenarios
Your SpendType is passed into the application page automatically.
